Recent reviews

Nico Meadows

Where do I even start with this train wreck of a company. First of all they make it a slog to get a referee, epecially if youre an older person with no family or friends to ask. and on top of that, even if you send the details of a person with a registered buisness, they can just... reject it and say its not enough. Secondly it states on their website that they wont give you a refund unless they consider the reason to be their fault! so even if you get rejected and decide you want to make a better descision and go elsewhere you cant even get your money back. And lastly, CitizenCard themselves will likely reply to this review, dont bother reading it, one glance at all the reviews is all it takes to realise that they just copypaste replies and make no effort to actually reply just so they can keep up their score. Garbage Company, Garbage Service! Please just go elsewhere, dont make the same mistake I did.

CitizenCard

citizencard.com

Haniyah Strong

I ordered the Lumina - 18" Piano Color Swiss HD Full Lace Human Hair Boho Braided Wig Mix Blond 27/1B 27 base / Medium 22" and the braids were stiff and bent even when I used hot water and steam to loosen the hairs. The synthetic used for the braids is really cheap, scratchy, and hard as a rock when you touched the braid. When the wig is on the braids are stuck sticking out in a crazy way. A better synthetic blend shouldve been used. The photos obviously look better than the actual product. I’m assuming the girl in photos is an influencer or something and received a better wig. Aside from that the wigcrafting is good, the lace is practically invisible, the cap fits well, there is an elastic band to make the slightly bigger. Honestly it’s a good wig excluding the poor quality braids. If you’re ok with rebraiding the wig then you should get it.

JALIZA

jaliza.com

Oriana Agudelo

My booking through Omio was disrupted due to operational changes by IRYO. The train was delayed and the connection I booked is no longer usable. IRYO has already cancelled the reservation and issued a full refund, confirming that Omio can verify this in their system. However, Omio’s website does not allow me to process the refund or modify the journey, and the chat support bot repeatedly crashes when I try to reach a human agent. I have already attempted to contact support through multiple channels without success. This situation was completely outside my control and I simply need assistance from a human agent to process the refund and help modify my trip. I hope Omio can resolve this issue promptly.

Omio

omio.com

Del Handley

The tech ring was the best investment it has given me more confidence about my erections! I'm glad firm tech came up with the tech ring it has changed my life.if any men or women are reading the reviews go for the tech ring it's worth it,I've got the performance ring which I use now and then I love tech rings products. If you have any questions there custom service is great. The technology is great! The tech ring is very comfortable to wear through the night.

This was my first time purchasing from the company for a mother's day gift. The order arrived today and I'm disappointed with the packaging, the jewellery is secured to small cards in a small orange paper envelope. Considering the money I spent, the packaging makes the jewellery look cheap, very disappointed. The jewellery itself looks nice, the bracelet detail is smaller than I expected, just left disappointed at the cheap looking packaging.

I order five packets of blades for my husband at an excellent price. The product arrived in good time, but there were only 4 packets. I contacted customer service and they refunded the missing packet immediately. On my experience I would recommend this company.
